scripts.apply:build: npx --yes codemod@latest jssg run --target ../build/commands/upload.js -l javascript ./codemod.ts && npx --yes codemod@latest jssg run --target ../build/commands/build/index.js -l javascript ./codemod.ts && npx --yes codemod@latest jssg run --target ../build/sentry.js -l javascript ./codemod.ts && npx --yes codemod@latest jssg run --target ../build/build/local.js -l javascript ./codemod.ts && npx --yes codemod@latest jssg run --target ../build/build/runBuildAndSubmit.js -l javascript ./codemod.ts && npx --yes codemod@latest jssg run --target ../build/graphql/mutations/BuildMutation.js -l javascript ./codemod.ts
scripts.test: npx --yes codemod@latest jssg test -l javascript ./codemod.ts ./@fixtures --strictness loose
